segments.note: seg1: bloom(spirit2+mana1) at 48% is near-floor reach at 6x value; starts spirit chain + live bloom colour; Bloom buys the ROYAL draw where the deck-wave rares live. Fang only as corrupt-vs-dead insurance.

seg2: true mind 61%/3pts vs floor spirit 69%/1pt — chain is only length 1 so the break is cheap, Trinity rotation stays open, and True pays a trade-grade draw (uncommon station = the deck-wave cards). Bloom body 17.5% is a trap.

seg3 BOSS (Soaked Scholar): all rungs repriced flat ~33% because forced mana keeps FEED true+bloom (nice generator moment). Flat reach means value dominates: bloom mind = 6pts + extends mind chain + royal draw (rare deck-wave cards). Fang lastResort.

perks.note: ash draw after stitched bloom. Shift x2 is a TRAP with a clean hand (boon fizzles, rider still etches) — refused. Thousand Cuts fires every resolve vs Patient Needle spare-spin clause that my push style rarely meets.

trade draw. Fang lien (on_keep random-reroll) sits on d5 fang face = already COLD parking (only kept lastResort). Shift would trade that for an on_roll Errant Spin rider on a RANDOM face — strictly worse; refusing Shift is the placement skill here. Deep Ink clean, Deepen synergy later.
